title: TugkanDeMan's Weaponry
description: adds various vanilla friendly weapons into the game, adds improvements to the existing vanilla weapons and more.
body:
TugkanDeMan's Weaponry adds various weapons to minecraft.
It his highly highly recommended to use "Better Combat" mod together with TugkanDeMan's Weaponry

Swords:

Glass sword
Soulmetal Sword
Katana
Macahuitl
Bloodthirster
Breaker Blade
Copper Sword
Steel Sword
Gilded Netherite Sword
Brightsteel Sword
Aurum Sword

Maces:

Wooden Club
Wooden Mace
Copper Mace
Iron Mace
Steel Mace

Gauntlets:

Terrapotta
Gauntilus
Fist of the Sea
Shulker Gauntlet

Wooden Hammer
Steel Hammer

These weapons will improve your gameplay and adventures and add many new experiences to your next modpack! Dying a lot to strong mobs? Use the Bloodthirster Sword to survive in dire circumstances. Other weapons like glass swords will help your early game by being cheap and strong alternatives for diamond swords.

For Questions, join the discord https://discord.gg/p5xajUAwa8
or leave them in the comments
